name: wool_no_ads
description: A Wool Crush no-ads badge: the exact letters "ADS" stitched in chunky dark-brown yarn on a cream felt patch, crossed by a bold coral-red prohibition ring and diagonal slash, framed by a small turquoise yarn loop.
prompt_extra: requested text is exactly ADS; slash and ring sit clearly above the letters; readable at 64px; no other text

variants.name: felt
variants.prompt_extra: soft cream felt patch with stitched edge

variants.name: yarn
variants.prompt_extra: more prominent turquoise yarn-loop frame, simpler patch
